summary: Despite occasional reported incidents, the risk of anesthetic from a paravertebral block diffusing into the subarachnoid space is minimal due to significant anatomical separation by the dura mater. Therefore, this pathway represents the most unlikely site of unintended diffusion when comparing all available locations.
